title: Technical Evaluation - IT Department
instructions: Please answer the following questions to the best of your ability. This evaluation is designed to assess your technical knowledge, problem-solving ability, creativity, communication skills, and practical IT experience. IMPORTANT: For practical development, website, and graphic design tasks, upload your work publicly on Google Drive, GitHub, Behance, Figma, Canva, Netlify, Vercel, or any accessible platform. Then create a text (.txt) file containing the links to your uploaded work clearly labeled according to the respective question numbers. Email the text file as an attachment to misc@tradesmartzm.com before submission.

questions.title: Grammar
questions.content: The IT Officer ________ responsible for maintaining the company network.

questions.title: Vocabulary
questions.content: A firewall helps to ________ unauthorized access to a network.

questions.title: Professional Communication
questions.content: Write a short email responding to a staff member whose laptop cannot connect to the office Wi-Fi.

questions.title: Customer Support
questions.content: How would you explain a technical issue to a non-technical staff member?

questions.title: Troubleshooting
questions.content: A user reports that their computer powers on but displays a black screen. Explain the troubleshooting steps you would take.

questions.title: Networking
questions.content: A laptop connects to Wi-Fi but has no internet access. What could be the possible causes and solutions?

questions.title: Hardware Knowledge
questions.content: Name and explain the function of any four major computer hardware components.

questions.title: Preventative Maintenance
questions.content: What regular maintenance activities should be carried out on office computers and servers?

questions.title: IP Addressing
questions.content: What is an IP address and why is it important in networking?

questions.title: Active Directory & User Management
questions.content: Explain the process of creating and managing user accounts in an organization.

questions.title: Data Backup
questions.content: Describe a good backup and disaster recovery strategy for a company.

questions.title: Server Monitoring
questions.content: What tools or methods can be used to monitor server performance, backups, and security?

questions.title: Security Awareness
questions.content: What are phishing attacks and how can employees avoid them?

questions.title: Password Security
questions.content: What makes a strong password policy in an organization?

questions.title: Endpoint Protection
questions.content: List and explain three ways to secure company computers and data.

questions.title: Website Management
questions.content: Describe the steps you would take to update and maintain a company website.

questions.title: Software Development
questions.content: What programming languages, frameworks, or technologies are you familiar with? Explain how you have used them.

questions.title: Practical Development Task
questions.content: Create a simple responsive webpage for Tradesmart Supplies Limited that includes a homepage banner, company description, and contact section. Upload the project publicly (GitHub, Google Drive, Netlify, Vercel, etc.). Include the public link in the text file and email it to misc@tradesmartzm.com.

questions.title: Graphic Design Knowledge
questions.content: Which graphic design tools have you used before and for what type of projects?

questions.title: Poster Design Task
questions.content: Design a professional promotional poster for Tradesmart Supplies Limited advertising an IT service or product. Upload the design publicly (Google Drive, Behance, Canva, Figma, etc.). Include the public link in the text file and email it to misc@tradesmartzm.com.

questions.title: Social Media Creativity
questions.content: Create a sample social media post design for Tradesmart Supplies Limited promoting cybersecurity awareness. Upload the design publicly and include the accessible link in the text file emailed to misc@tradesmartzm.com.

questions.title: Office IT Support
questions.content: An employee accidentally deleted important company files. Explain the steps you would take to recover the files.

questions.title: Network Downtime
questions.content: The office internet suddenly stops working during business hours. Describe your troubleshooting process.

questions.title: System Upgrade
questions.content: How would you plan and execute a company-wide operating system upgrade with minimal downtime?

questions.title: IT Policy
questions.content: What IT policies would you recommend for employees regarding email usage, passwords, and internet access?

questions.title: Innovation & Improvement
questions.content: Suggest three ways technology can improve efficiency and productivity at Tradesmart Supplies Limited.
